digest.component_or_area: local dev / agent clone identity + signing-key setup
propositions: Each human/agent clone must use its own identity rather than the bot identity when writing non-exempt tickets.
Documentation should describe creating/owning an identity ticket and selecting it via a git-ignored current-identity file.
The signing key must be configured per-machine from the developer's local SSH private key and never committed.
Docs must explain the git email fallback resolution path for identity.
A clone following the docs should produce a signed write verifiable via rebar show or rebar verify-authorship, not verify-signature.
